articles.title_en: Ukraine imposed sanctions against 23 tankers and some Russian citizens
articles.lead_en: According to the Kyiv authorities, these vessels are used to export oil to the Russian Federation.

articles.title_en: Peskov: it is important to maintain dialogue to balance energy markets
articles.lead_en: The press secretary of the Russian President commented on the possibility of Russia leaving the OPEC+ format
